entities.name: Blurb
entities.context: Third-person forwarding content designed to be shared by connectors

entities.name: Connector
entities.context: Person who forwards blurb to target on V's behalf

entities.name: V's Voice
entities.context: Writing style requiring em-dashes, conversational confidence, specific numbers, no AI-speak

entities.name: Crisp Articulation
entities.context: Rule requiring one clear 'What I'm looking for' statement in 1-2 sentences

entities.name: Thrust-Appropriate Tone
entities.context: Principle that tone, value prop, and CTA must align with intent (sales vs info vs network)

entities.name: Context Reference
entities.context: Rule requiring mention of specific detail from connector conversation to avoid templated feel

entities.name: Two Components Structure
entities.context: Format rule limiting output to wrapper email for connector plus ultra-short forwardable blurb

entities.name: Anti-Patterns
entities.context: Collection of behaviors to avoid in blurb writing

relationships.context: Blurbs must be written in V's voice style
Blurbs must reference specific connector conversation details
